pi_items.source: Task description specifies this exact text; export_result.sh checks for this exact string using grep -Fq

pi_items.metadata_value: Sun, Cloud, Water Tower, Water Treatment Plant (as stated in task description)
pi_items.verified_value: Sun, Cloud, Water pumping station (near river), Sewage treatment plant
pi_items.source: GitHub raw Watercycle.qml source code (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gcompris/GCompris-qt/master/src/activities/watercycle/Watercycle.qml) specifies: 'First click on the sun, then on the cloud, the water pumping station near the river, the sewage treatment, and at last regulate the switch'

privileged_info_summary: The water cycle activity exists in GCompris Science category with the correct name. The task correctly identifies the Sun and Cloud as clickable components. However, the task description mentions 'Water Tower' but the actual interactive component is a water pumping station (near the river). The correct sequence is: Sun → Cloud → Water pumping station → Sewage treatment plant. The file paths (/home/ga/Documents/water_cycle_status.txt and /home/ga/Documents/active_cycle.png) and expected text content are correct.
